injuries.comment: The Capitals said that Carlson missed morning skate and will be a game-time decision for Saturday (Nov. 15) game versus the Devils, per Bailey Johnson of The Washington Post.
Glass suffered an undisclosed injury in Wednesday's (Nov. 12) game versus the Blackhawks.
Hamilton (lower body) will be out of action for at least one week, Amanda Stein of the Devils' official site reports Saturday.
The Devils said on Saturday (Nov. 15) that Hughes is expected to miss the next 8 weeks after successfully undergoing surgery on his finger.
